MediaRoute.title: Media Route Config
MediaRoute.connectorRequiredHint: Token API is selected but connector is not configured, media generation will fail.
MediaRoute.autoCapability: Auto mode has no media overrides. If generation fails, configure connector/model manually.

VoicePanel.title: Voice Model Config
VoicePanel.enabledNote: Voice replies and voice input are enabled. Voice list is scoped to the selected route and model.
VoicePanel.disabledNote: Voice is disabled. Local-Chat will not run TTS, STT, or voice catalog queries until you enable it.
VoicePanel.noModels: No available model for current connector.
VoicePanel.noVoices: No available voices for the current route and model.
